title: dianthus broteri
intro: Dianthus broteri, a species of flowering plant in the carnation family, is native to the Iberian Peninsula and is known for its delicate, pink to purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dianthus broteri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable herb for those suffering from gastrointestinal problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its medicinal properties can also be extracted through cold-pressing or steam distillation to create essential oils and extracts for further use.
